restartType.description: The method for scheduling restarts. Use "Fixed" for intervals or "Realtime" for specific times of day.

restartInterval.description: If restartType is "Fixed", this is the interval in hours between restarts.

realTimeInterval.description: If restartType is "Realtime", this is a list of times (in HH:mm format) to restart the server.

bossbarEnabled.description: Enable or disable the boss bar warning for restarts.

bossBarMessage.description: The message to display in the boss bar. Placeholders: {hours}, {minutes}, {seconds}, {time}.

timerUseChat.description: Enable or disable sending restart warnings to the chat.

BroadcastMessage.description: The message to broadcast in chat. Placeholders: {hours}, {minutes}, {seconds}, {time}.

timerBroadcast.description: A list of times in seconds before a restart to broadcast a warning.

defaultRestartReason.description: The default kick message shown to players when the server restarts.

playSoundEnabled.description: Enable or disable playing a sound effect for restart warnings.

playSoundFirstTime.description: The time in seconds before a restart at which to start playing warning sounds.

titleEnabled.description: Enable or disable the on-screen title warning for restarts.

titleStayTime.description: How long the title warning should stay on screen, in seconds.

titleMessage.description: The message to display as a title. Placeholders: {hours}, {minutes}, {seconds}, {time}.

preRestartCommands.description: Commands to run seconds before the restart. Each item has 'secondsBefore' and 'command'. Use [asPlayer], asplayer:, or each: at the start to run the command once per online player as that player (with per-player placeholders). Without a marker, the command runs as console.
